name: cheerer
description: Plays pixel animations and multilingual voice encouragement when Claude Code finishes a task.

lang.title: Voice language
lang.description: Voice language for encouragement messages (zh / en / ja, default: zh)

anim.title: Animation style
anim.description: Animation style (random / basketball / dance / fireworks / epic, default: random)

voice.title: Voice output
voice.description: Enable voice output (on / off / true / false, default: on)
